text.message: Black are your racing for wood port
gj on handing over a city red
I’ll have  wheat to trade on 6

gave blue the game while doing it
I dunno man. It’s a tight game
OJ? Seems like a good trade
Can I get a wood nb?
Got one from blue all good red
Red u got win right here?
Not gonna fight road and army
I would if I were u
There are 6 cities on the board
It’s reds turn to get over robbed
Well I’m way too far away to be eating solos
I was eating them at 4 points?
If blue was online he would have win fs
